channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Wien Matzleinsdorfer Platz ↔ Wien Hauptbahnhof
item.description: Due to persons on the tracks, no journeys were possible between Vienna Hbf (U) and Bruck/Mur station until 11:52 clock. [Since 29.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to persons on the tracks, no journeys were possible between Vienna Hbf (U) and Bruck/Mur station until 11:52 clock.
[Since 29.06.2026]

item.title: 14A: defective truck
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective truck. [On 29.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective truck.
[On 29.06.2026]

item.title: 25: Heat-related damage to the line
item.description: Operation only between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Josef-Baumann-Gasse. [28.06.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Operation only between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Josef-Baumann-Gasse.
[28.06.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: 25: track damage Einstieg on line 26 (stop direction Floridsdorf )
item.description: track damage Einstieg on line 26 (stop direction Floridsdorf <>) [On 29.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
track damage Einstieg on line 26 (stop direction Floridsdorf <>)
[On 29.06.2026]

item.title: 11/71: track construction works (phase 2)
item.description: Because of track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short tours occur in the evening hours Monday to Friday on the lines 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). Period … [29.06.2026 – 29.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short tours occur in the evening hours Monday to Friday on the lines 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). Period …
[29.06.2026 – 29.08.2026]

item.title: N41: track construction works Spitalgasse
item.description: Due to extensive track construction works in the range Spitalgasse there is an diversion of the line N41. Period: From Tuesday, 8. July 2026 Start of operation … [07.07.2026 – 06.09.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to extensive track construction works in the range Spitalgasse there is an diversion of the line N41. Period: From Tuesday, 8. July 2026 Start of operation …
[07.07.2026 – 06.09.2027]

item.title: Gentzgasse from Aumannplatz and Lazaristengasse to Köhlergasse
item.description: Since the affected tram lines will also be discontinued during the period from 4. May 2026 to 27. June 2026, Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG will have a … [27.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Since the affected tram lines will also be discontinued during the period from 4. May 2026 to 27. June 2026, Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG will have a …
[27.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Gänserndorf
item.description: construction works between Gänserndorf train station and Deutsch Wagram train station from Gänserndorf09.2026 (00:10 clock) to 05.10.2026 (04:20 clock) some local trains … [Since 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works between Gänserndorf train station and Deutsch Wagram train station from Gänserndorf09.2026 (00:10 clock) to 05.10.2026 (04:20 clock) some local trains …
[Since 24.06.2026]

item.title: Wien Floridsdorf ↔ Wien Praterstern
item.description: construction works between Wien Floridsdorf train station (U) and Wien Praterstern train station (U) between 1209.2026 to 1309.2026 some local trains cannot operate. [Since 24.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
construction works between Wien Floridsdorf train station (U) and Wien Praterstern train station (U) between 1209.2026 to 1309.2026 some local trains cannot operate.
[Since 24.06.2026]

item.title: 29A/29B/N30: Patrizigasse
item.description: Stop change of lines 29A, 29B and N30 towards Großfeldsiedlung U (29A, 29B) and Neu Leopoldau (N30) Stop: Patrizigase From: Freytaggasse32X to: approximately … [24.06.2026 – 24.06.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of lines 29A, 29B and N30 towards Großfeldsiedlung U (29A, 29B) and Neu Leopoldau (N30) Stop: Patrizigase From: Freytaggasse32X to: approximately …
[24.06.2026 – 24.06.2027]
